title: Kommentare: OrangePi 2G-IOT Android 4.4 SDK
body:
Historische Kommentare aus WordPress, importiert aus dem alten Blog.

**Ursprünglicher Post:** [OrangePi 2G-IOT Android 4.4 SDK](https://the78mole.de/orangepi-2g-iot-android-sdk/)  
**Neuer Post:** [/blog/2018/orangepi-2g-iot-android-sdk](/blog/2018/orangepi-2g-iot-android-sdk)

comments.author: Marco
comments.body: The Torrent is dead, no peers. do you still have the file somewhere?

replies.author: themole
replies.body:
Hi Marco,

yes, seems that the torrent is dead, but currently, I have no access to the file, so I can't share it again :-(

Regards,
Daniel
